case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA V LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY $14,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,300.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
